data.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent seeks new Fed Chair to shrink institution, end perpetual QE; criticizes Fed as 'engine of inequality.'
data.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is actively interviewing candidates for the next Federal Reserve Chair, with a focus on finding a leader committed to reducing the central bank's size and ending perpetual quantitative easing. In a podcast, Bessent criticized the Fed's monetary policies of the past 15 years, advocating for a rollback of the large-scale asset purchases that began in 2008. He referred to the Fed as "the engine of inequality," arguing that its actions have widened the wealth gap by benefiting asset holders over Main Street. Bessent emphasized the need to restore economic fairness by changing the Fed's approach. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Zoomcar and Namma Kutumb collaborate to offer 'Good Fleet' in Bengaluru, with bookings supporting education for youth.
data.description: In Bengaluru, guests now have the opportunity to reserve certain Namma Kutumb vehicles through Zoomcar. The revenue generated from these bookings will be allocated towards funding education and skilling initiatives for orphaned and underprivileged youth. This collaboration aims to support the underprivileged community in Bengaluru. The partnership is expected to positively impact a significant number of individuals in need.

data.title: INJ aims for $4.84 rebound by December amidst bearish trend, supported at $4.72, as per price prediction analysis.
data.description: The price prediction for INJ indicates a target of $4.84 by December 26, based on technical analysis. The analysis suggests a potential bounce from the $4.72 support level, despite the continued presence of bearish momentum.

data.title: Azimut sells 50% interest in Galinée Property to LiFT Power in James Bay region, Quebec. Initial disclosure on Dec. 15, 2025.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Azimut Exploration Inc. disclosed that it has signed an acquisition agreement with LiFT Power Ltd. to sell its 50% interest in the Galinée Property in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay region of Quebec. This agreement involves LiFT, listed on TSXV as LIFT and OTCQX as LIFFF, acquiring the property from Azimut, listed on TSXV as AZM and OTCQX as AZMTF. The transaction, which was first revealed on December 15, 2025, coincided with LiFT's planned acquisition of Winsome Resources Ltd., the owner of the nearby Adina property. The figures mentioned in the announcement were Figures 1 and 2, illustrating the details of the respective properties.

data.title: Glassnode, Swissblock, and Willy Woo collaborate on Bitcoin Vector #35 for detailed analysis on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and DeFi.
data.description: The latest Bitcoin Vector #35, a collaboration between Glassnode, Swissblock, and Willy Woo, provides an in-depth market analysis focusing on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and DeFi. The report offers detailed insights and data on the current trends and developments in the crypto market. It presents a comprehensive overview of key metrics and indicators for investors and enthusiasts to stay informed. Find out more about the analysis in the full report.

data.title: Glassnode's report analyzes altcoin markets, revealing key info on high-conviction setups and market volatility. #cryptocurrency #insights
data.description: In its recent report, Glassnode delves into the altcoin markets, offering in-depth analysis on high-conviction trading opportunities and market unpredictability. The report discusses various critical numbers related to altcoins such as market capitalization, trading volume, and price movements, aiming to provide valuable insights for investors. These findings align with predictions by analysts who anticipate price targets for Toncoin to range between $2.15 and $2.50 by the end of December 2025.

data.title: Advantest wins Excellent Performance Award at TSMC Forum for Excellent Production Support, first time recipient.
data.description: On December 24, 2025, Advantest Corporation, a top supplier of semiconductor test equipment listed as TSE: 6857, revealed their win of TSMC's Excellent Performance Award for Excellent Production Support. This marks Advantest's inaugural award at TSMC's annual Supply Chain Management Forum, signifying their industry recognition.

data.title: Li-FT Power acquires 50% interest in Galinée Property from Azimut, signing definitive project agreement.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 24, 2025, Li-FT Power Ltd. ("Li-FT") has announced that it has finalized a project acquisition agreement with Azimut Exploration Inc. ("Azimut"). This agreement involves Li-FT acquiring 50% of the exclusive exploration rights for the Galinée property, known as the Galinée Transaction. This follows Li-FT's recent press release on December 14, 2025, regarding its scheme implementation deed with Winsome Resources Ltd. and a non-binding letter of intent with Azimut and SOQUEM Inc. The transaction is subject to meeting specific conditions. Li-FT is listed on the TSXV under LIFT, OTCQX as LIFFF, and Frankfurt as WS0, while Azimut is listed on the TSXV under AZM and OTCQX as AZMTF.
